name: zabir-boutiques
description: Zabir Boutiques AI Commerce Platform - Astro + Cloudflare (static output with server adapter)

scripts.build: npm run build:snapshots && astro build && npm run bundlewatch
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0001_initial_v6_8a_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0002_indexes.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0003_staff_operations_v2.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0004_partial_prepay.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0005_password_salt.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0006_api_keys.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0007_audit_chain.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0008_security_hardening.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0009_staff_roles_developer_auditor.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0010_coupon_claim_tokens.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0011_master_prompt_v7_gaps.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0012_fts5_search.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0013_order_state_machine_constraints.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0014_inventory_baseline.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0015_tamper_lockout.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0016_invoices.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0017_variants_stock_generated.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --local --file=./db/migrations/0018_schema_constraints.sql
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0001_initial_v6_8a_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0002_indexes.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0003_staff_operations_v2.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0004_partial_prepay.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0005_password_salt.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0006_api_keys.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0007_audit_chain.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0008_security_hardening.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0009_staff_roles_developer_auditor.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0010_coupon_claim_tokens.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0011_master_prompt_v7_gaps.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0012_fts5_search.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0013_order_state_machine_constraints.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0014_inventory_baseline.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0015_tamper_lockout.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0016_invoices.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0017_variants_stock_generated.sql && wrangler d1 execute zabir-db --remote --file=./db/migrations/0018_schema_constraints.sql
